Menu.thankYouConfirmed: Thank you. Your order is confirmed.
Menu.completePayment: Complete payment to confirm your order.
Menu.itemsInCart: {count, plural, one {# item in cart} other {# items in cart}}
Menu.chooseOptions: Choose your options, then add to order.
Menu.notePlaceholder: e.g. No onions, allergy to nuts…
Menu.emptyMenuHint: This table link works, but the restaurant hasn’t published any menu items (or they’re all hidden). Ask the owner to add items in the dashboard, or run the demo seed: npm run db:seed
Menu.emptyMenuWrongLink: If you expected a menu, check the QR link or URL (e.g. /m/table-1 for the demo).

OrderStatus.paymentOk: Payment successful. Your order is confirmed.
OrderStatus.pendingMessage: Complete payment to confirm. You can pay at the table or online.
OrderStatus.paidMessage: The kitchen has your order and will start preparing it shortly.
OrderStatus.preparingMessage: The kitchen is making your food. We’ll notify you when it’s ready.
OrderStatus.readyMessage: Your order is ready! Your server will bring it to your table shortly.
OrderStatus.deliveredMessage: Your order has been brought to your table. Enjoy your meal!
OrderStatus.declinedMessage: The restaurant could not take this order. If you already paid online, contact the staff or check your payment provider.
